channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-09 05:17 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: "Canada has free healthcare" Wait times ... Surgery : 284 days or longer Kill you : no wait I guess ...
item.description: "Canada has free healthcare" Wait times ... Surgery : 284 days or longer Kill you : no wait I guess they did the financial math and it is cheaper to offer to kill their citizens. So they prioritized that. Then they made it easier for 3rd world migrants to come and replace them. This is the end result of socialism.

item.title: @elonmusk: Getting drilled 😂 When AI can make original videos like this, we will have reached AGI 🚀youtu.be/wat...
item.description: Getting drilled 😂 When AI can make original videos like this, we will have reached AGI 🚀youtu.be/watch?v=a0fkNd…

item.title: @elonmusk: Have you ever bought anything based on an ad on this platform?
item.description: Have you ever bought anything based on an ad on this platform?

item.title: @elonmusk: Twitter 1.0 under Bret Taylor. Will OpenAI ban sitting presidents from their services if they hurt t...
item.description: Twitter 1.0 under Bret Taylor. Will OpenAI ban sitting presidents from their services if they hurt their feelings?

item.title: @elonmusk: I will never hide the thinking trace from Grok and its agents. Watching them thinking and discuss is...
item.description: I will never hide the thinking trace from Grok and its agents. Watching them thinking and discuss is pure entertainment for me.

item.title: @elonmusk: One year ago today, I took delivery of my Launch Series Model Y at Giga Texas. Best car I've ever ow...
item.description: One year ago today, I took delivery of my Launch Series Model Y at Giga Texas. Best car I've ever owned. It can drive itself anywhere I need to go, is constantly improving, I never need to do any oil changes (I always hated those), and costs me just $18 to fully charge.

item.title: @elonmusk: Trump says he will not sign another bill until the SAVE America Act is passed and is not going to st...
item.description: Trump says he will not sign another bill until the SAVE America Act is passed and is not going to stop talking about it. This should be the Senate’s sole focus. Get this done or you will be betraying your voters. Where do you stand on the talking filibuster? -@LeaderJohnThune-@lisamurkowski-@SenJohnCurtis-@SenKevinCramer-@SenThomTillis

item.title: @elonmusk: I use this analogy a lot. This is what a room full of computers looked like in old times:
item.description: I use this analogy a lot. This is what a room full of computers looked like in old times:

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
